original_company_name: Industrial Distributors, Inc. (IDI) specializes in providing advanced filtration, separation, and purification technology for major industrial processing facilities in the Rocky Mountain region of the United States. Their main offerings include technologies for separating particulates from gas or liquid streams, high efficiency gas/liquid separation, and liquid/liquid separation, as well as other purification solutions such as activated carbon adsorption, clay for clarification of liquid hydrocarbons, desiccants for dehydration, and membranes for vapor phase removal of carbon dioxide from natural gas. Their typical customers are industrial processing facilities in the Rocky Mountain region, with a particular emphasis on hydrocarbon process markets. They differentiate themselves through their advanced purification technology, experienced application engineering, and a focus on optimizing existing filtration installations or engineering new systems tailored to specific requirements
